text:
Created attachment 260395
diff to main

I made an argument that the exp-run isn't really needed and I also did test all the consumers, but well...

pkgmgr@, Matthias insists on an exp-run for this change. See the attached patch or my branch at https://github.com/arrowd/freebsd-ports/tree/libuuid
